title: Trailer Edition
description: Minecraft Trailer Edition is a modpack that will make you feel like you are in the minecraft trailer it also has optional mods like create you can also join minecraft server origin realms in trailer look
body:
Minecraft Trailer Edition is a modpack that will make you feel like you are in the minecraft trailer it also has optional mods like create (create is currently not in the modpack because of incompabilities) you can also join the minecraft server origin realms in trailer look




---Planned Mods/Others---
"Barely Default Ressource Pack" 
"Quark mod"
"Create mod"



---Mods/Others---
Origin Realms Server
WorldEdit



If you have suggestions feel free to put them in the comments
If you have issues also type them in the comments

if you dont know the ressource pack order go to the gallery tab theres an image of the right order
